PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?labor ?laborLabel WHERE {
  ?labor wdt:P361 wd:Q1233460 .
  ?labor rdfs:label ?laborLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?laborLabel) = "en")
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?labor wdt:P807 ?target .
    ?target wdt:P31 wd:Q891729 .
    ?target wdt:P1537 wd:Q122248 .
  }
}
ORDER BY ?laborLabel
